nodes.label: Mio Garden UI
nodes.rationale: Make Mio Garden the primary web control surface using shadcn/ui primitives, Iconify icons, Botanical Garden tokens, and focused motion interactions; flat Material 3 inspired panels with no visible borders.

nodes.label: Config Management Goal
nodes.rationale: Edit runtime config without SSH: read/write ~/.config/miobridge/config.yaml through service APIs, validate YAML and supported fields before write, backup before every write with rollback, hot-reload safe fields, and clearly mark fields requiring service restart.

nodes.label: Subscription Sources Goal
nodes.rationale: Stop relying only on local sing-box config names; support sing-box config, remote URL, manual text, and uploaded node files, test each source before saving, track status/node count/latency/failure reason, dedupe nodes with rename/filter rules.

nodes.label: Output Customization Goal
nodes.rationale: Let users shape generated Clash output: built-in templates, proxy group and rule editing, validate generated clash.yaml with mihomo, export YAML/install URL/QR code.

nodes.label: Observability Goal
nodes.rationale: Diagnose from the web UI before SSH: search/filter logs by level/time/keyword, record update history/duration/node count/errors, add /api/metrics or equivalent structured metrics, dashboard alerts and optional webhook notifications.

nodes.label: API and Quality Goal
nodes.rationale: Make the service easier to integrate and safer to change: publish OpenAPI docs for stable endpoints, standardize API errors and request validation, add unit/integration/E2E coverage for key flows, include tests in CI once stable enough to gate PRs.

nodes.label: v1.0 Distributed Node Control Plane
nodes.rationale: Shipped baseline: main node, Agent, HMAC, NodeManager, remote deployment, adapters; main node generates raw.txt/subscription.txt/clash.yaml, child nodes run Agent/kernel and expose source URLs, remote checks use public Agent HTTP plus HMAC with SSH for deploy/diagnosis.
